dict.string: One indexes the files you add to your knowledge sources so your agents can search them — under your consent. We never read other files on your Desktop.
One indexes the files you add to your knowledge sources so your agents can search them — under your consent. We never read other files in your Documents folder.
One indexes the files you add to your knowledge sources so your agents can search them — under your consent. We never read other files in your Downloads folder.
One uses AppleScript to read titles and bodies from Apple Notes when you connect Notes as a knowledge source. Notes are encrypted on your Mac with your Secure Enclave key.
One reads your Calendar so your agents can answer scheduling questions — under your consent. Calendar data is encrypted on your Mac with your Secure Enclave key.
One reads your Contacts only when you grant a per-person consent token, so your agents can resolve people by name. Contacts are encrypted on your Mac.
One reads your Reminders when you connect Reminders as a knowledge source — under your consent.
